description_long: This is a large, ornate stone sculpture featuring two human figures: one seated on a curved, high-backed bench and another standing in front, reaching toward the seated figure. The seated figure is draped in classical robes and appears to be holding an object, while the standing figure, also robed, leans forward in a gesture of offering or supplication. The bench is integrated into a broad, semi-circular stone base with several steps leading up to it, and the entire structure is set on a slightly raised, oval platform. The rear of the sculpture is rough and unfinished, contrasting with the detailed front. The material appears to be primarily weathered stone, with some areas showing patina, especially on the standing figure. The setting suggests it is intended as a commemorative or memorial monument, likely placed in a public outdoor space.
description: A grand stone sculpture of two robed human figures, one seated on a curved bench and another standing in front, set atop a stepped, oval platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows both figures clearly, with the seated figure on the bench and the standing figure reaching forward, as well as the detailed steps and base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the interaction between the two figures and the curvature of the bench, with the standing figure's gesture more prominent.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the rough, unfinished back of the bench and the platform, with no visible figures or detailed features.
description_view_3: This angled rear-side view shows the seated figure in profile and the standing figure partially, emphasizing the monument's depth and layered structure.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in classical attire, one seated and one standing, on a commemorative bench
attribute_location_context: outdoor setting, likely in a park or memorial area, with earth and some vegetation visible around the base
